old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4.1","title":"App: Find My Hacker - Live crowd map","description":"## Overview

Real-time map showing GPS positions of all 500 nodes. The hero visual for the demo.

## Features

### Big screen view
- Venue floor plan as background
- 500 dots, updated every few seconds
- Color by: gateway affiliation, battery level, or custom group
- Heatmap overlay toggle

### Search
- Type node name → dot highlights and pulses
- "Find my friend" use case
- QR code on each node links to its position

### Privacy
- Opt-out button on node (hold button 3 sec)
- Opted-out nodes disappear from map
- No historical tracking (current position only)

## Protocol

### Node → Gateway (every 30 sec)
CoAP POST /position
```json
{"lat": 36.1699, "lon": -115.1398, "alt": 0, "hdop": 1.2}
```

### Gateway → Dashboard (WebSocket)
```json
{"node": "abc123", "lat": 36.1699, "lon": -115.1398, "ts": 1234567890}
```

## Tech stack

- Frontend: Leaflet.js or Mapbox GL
- Backend: Python, aggregate from gateways
- Node: GPS read + CoAP POST, already in firmware

## Performance

- 500 nodes × 1 update/30s = 17 updates/sec
- Dashboard batches, renders at 10 FPS
- Stale dots fade after 60 sec no-update","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:48:49.292957Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:48:49.292957Z","labels":["demo","app","gps","apps","milestone","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:48:49.474982Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"notes":"## P2P vs Gateway

### P2P-capable (no gateway required)
- Node displays own position on e-ink
- Announce includes coords → neighbors show on local map
- Direct query: "where is node X?" → X responds if in range

### Gateway-enhanced
- Aggregated map of all 500 nodes
- Search across entire mesh
- Historical breadcrumbs (where was X 10 min ago?)
- Big screen visualization

### Firmware integration
Position sharing via announces is already in spec (section 9.7). P2P local map display is a firmware UI feature, not a separate app.

**Verdict: Core protocol feature + gateway visualization layer**"}

new_value: Added POST handler to /sensors/location for SenML crowd map positions (live map demo, HAL submit stub, matches deaddrop/coap patterns). OSCORE via service.
